title: Plutarch, Moralia: Whether Land or Sea Animals are Cleverer
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Land or Sea Animals are Cleverer.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Land or Sea Animals are Cleverer.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Whether Land or Sea Animals are Cleverer': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
